subcodes.first_line: We bear witness that there is none other God but Him. He hath ever dwelt in the heights of power and majesty, and will everlastingly abide in the summit of exaltation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نشهد انه لا اله الا هو لم یزل کان فی علو القدره و الجلال و لایزال یکون فی سمو
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
